EIML3@NeurIPS 2026
Home Calls for Papers Schedule

Important Dates

All deadlines are end of day Anywhere on Earth (AoE) unless otherwise noted.

DateMilestone
29 July 2026 Submission opens
29 August 2026 Paper submission deadline
1 – 27 September 2026 Review period
29 September 2026 Author notification
18 October 2026 Camera-ready submission deadline
12 / 13 December 2026 Main workshop

The workshop takes place on 12 December 2026 in Paris, France, co-located with NeurIPS 2026.

The 3rd Workshop on Epistemic Intelligence in Machine Learning

12 December 2026 · Paris, France

Questions? pc.eiml.workshop@gmail.com
